subtext: Fortifying the frontline, enduring the assault
description: From a military engineering background, the Stormwatch  have made a name for themselves as experts in conquering and fortifying objectives. Using a variety of fortifications to create strong defensive positions, any commander can be sure these units will hold their ground.

rule.name: Weather The Storm
rule.description:
As a Primary Action: create a Stormwatch Emplacement of your choice on an allied Stormwatch unit's tile.
This ability has Loading 1.

scheme.name: Determine Territory
scheme.description:
If you control more objectives than your opponent, you gain 3 VP.
Otherwise, you gain 1 CP.

commands.name: Transfer Equipment
commands.targets:
An allied Stormwatch Emplacement.
An allied Stormwatch unit on adjacent tiles.
commands.effects: That fortification moves to the unit's tile.

commands.name: Adaptive Defense
commands.targets:
An allied Stormwatch Emplacement.
An allied Stormwatch unit on the same tile.
commands.effects: That Emplacement becomes the type of your choice.

commands.name: Take Cover
commands.when: When an enemy unit declares an allied Infantry that shares a tile with a Fortification as the target for shooting
commands.effects: Until end of turn, that allied unit gains 3 Dodge.

abilities.name: Structural Repairs
abilities.description:
As a Primary Action: A non-Objective Fortification on this unit's tile recovers 2 HP. If it is a Stormwatch Emplacement, its health can be increased to 3.
This ability has Loading 1.

abilities.name: Portable Emplacements
abilities.description: Once per game, you may use the Weather The Storm ability on this unit's tile without spending a charge.

abilities.name: Position Broadcasting
abilities.description:
When you Order this unit to Conquer or Occupy, you may have it gain +1 Control until end of phase. 
If you do, it can be targetted by enemy shots as if it was not inside a Fortification and those wepaons had 1 extra Range.

abilities.name: Stabilizing Tripod
abilities.description: While this unit is inside a Fortification, its weapons gain Burst 2.

abilities.name: Construction speciallists
abilities.description: While this unit is in Reserves, the Weather The Storm ability has Loading 2 instead of 1.

abilities.name: Compact Deployment
abilities.description: This unit can be Deployed from Reserves when you create an Emplacement. Deploy it on that Emplacement's tile.

abilities.name: Structural Reinforcement
abilities.description: Fortifications on this tile cannot be dealt more than 1 damage per shot.

abilities.name: Endless Ammunition
abilities.description: Allied Infantry units on this tile gain Blast on their weapons.

abilities.name: Covering Steel
abilities.description: Units on this tile gain 2 Dodge.
